headline: Higher NII & Loan Growth to Support Citizens Financial's Q1 Earnings
summary: CFG's Q1 results, scheduled to report on April 16, are likely to reflect higher NII and loan growth, while rising expenses may weigh on performance.

headline: Citigroup (C) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Citigroup (C) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +15.80% and +3.83%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: PNC Financial Services Group Earnings: What To Look For From PNC
summary: Financial services giant PNC (NYSE:PNC) will be reporting earnings this Wednesday before the bell. Here’s what investors should know.
